name: scene_snapshot_diff_roundtrip
description: End-to-end round-trip of scene_snapshot + mutation + scene_diff. Confirms diff actually catches added objects, transform changes, and renames by GUID — the agent-stability contract.

args.script:
import c4d
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
for n in ['DiffStartCube', 'DiffStartLight', 'DiffNewSphere']:
    o = doc.SearchObject(n)
    if o: o.Remove()
cg = c4d.BaseObject(c4d.Ocube)
cg.SetName('DiffStartCube')
cg.SetAbsPos(c4d.Vector(0, 0, 0))
doc.InsertObject(cg)
lt = c4d.BaseObject(c4d.Olight)
lt.SetName('DiffStartLight')
doc.InsertObject(lt)
c4d.EventAdd()
print('setup ok, scene has DiffStartCube + DiffStartLight')

import c4d
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
cube = doc.SearchObject('DiffStartCube')
cube.SetAbsPos(c4d.Vector(200, 50, 0))
lt = doc.SearchObject('DiffStartLight')
lt.SetName('DiffStartLight_renamed')
sg = c4d.BaseObject(c4d.Osphere)
sg.SetName('DiffNewSphere')
doc.InsertObject(sg)
c4d.EventAdd()
print('mutated: cube moved, light renamed, sphere added')

import c4d
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
for n in ['DiffStartCube', 'DiffStartLight_renamed', 'DiffNewSphere']:
    o = doc.SearchObject(n)
    if o: o.Remove()
c4d.EventAdd()
print('teardown ok')
